properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.code-pool-executor
properties.description: Specify implementation class of code container pool runtime service

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.code-timeout
properties.description: Python code execution time limit

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.container-name-prefix
properties.description: Container name prefix

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.container-timeout
properties.description: Maximum container runtime

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.core-container-num
properties.description: Maximum number of core containers

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.core-thread-size
properties.description: Core thread count of thread pool

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.cpu-core
properties.description: Number of container CPU cores

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.host
properties.description: Service host, use default address if null

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.image-name
properties.description: Image name, can customize image with common third-party dependencies to replace this configuration

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.keep-thread-alive-time
properties.description: Task survival time of thread pool, in seconds

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.limit-memory
properties.description: Maximum container memory, in MB

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.max-thread-size
properties.description: Maximum thread count of thread pool

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.network-mode
properties.description: Container network mode

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.python-max-tries-count
properties.description: Python执行的最大重试次数

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.task-queue-size
properties.description: Task blocking queue size

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.temp-container-alive-time
properties.description: Survival time of temporary containers, in minutes

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.temp-container-num
properties.description: Maximum number of temporary containers

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.code-executor.thread-queue-size
properties.description: Task blocking queue size of thread pool

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.embedding-batch.encoding-type
properties.description: encodingType 默认值：cl100k_base，适用于OpenAI等模型

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.embedding-batch.max-text-count
properties.description: 每批次最大文本数量 适用于DashScope等有文本数量限制的API DashScope限制为10

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.embedding-batch.max-token-count
properties.description: 每批次最大令牌数 值越小，每批次文档越少，但更安全 值越大，处理效率越高，但可能超出API限制 建议值：2000-8000，根据实际API限制调整

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.embedding-batch.reserve-percentage
properties.description: 预留百分比 用于预留缓冲空间，避免超出限制 建议值：0.1-0.2（10%-20%）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.enable-sql-result-chart
properties.description: 是否启用SQL执行结果图表判断，默认启用

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.enrich-sql-result-timeout
properties.description: 执行SQL结果图表化超时时间，默认3000ms

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.image-size
properties.description: 头像图片大小上限（字节）。默认 2MB。

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.oss.access-key-id
properties.description: OSS访问密钥ID

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.oss.access-key-secret
properties.description: OSS访问密钥Secret

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.oss.bucket-name
properties.description: OSS存储桶名称

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.oss.custom-domain
properties.description: 自定义域名（可选）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.oss.endpoint
properties.description: OSS端点地址

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.path
properties.description: 本地上传目录路径。

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.path-prefix
properties.description: 对象存储路径前缀（通用配置，对OSS和本地存储都适用）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.type
properties.description: 存储类型：local（本地存储）、oss（阿里云OSS）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.file.url-prefix
properties.description: 对外暴露的访问前缀。

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.max-sql-optimize-count
properties.description: sql优化最多次数

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.max-sql-retry-count
properties.description: sql执行失败重试次数

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.maxplanlength
properties.description: 单次规划最大长度限制

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.maxturnhistory
properties.description: 最多保留的对话轮数

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.sql-score-threshold
properties.description: sql优化分数阈值

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.chunk-size
properties.description: 默认分块大小，基于token数量 默认值：1000

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.paragraph.paragraph-overlap-chars
properties.description: 段落重叠字符数 默认值：200（保留前一个分块的最后200个字符，而非段落数量）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.recursive.chunk-overlap
properties.description: 重叠区域字符数 默认值：200

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.recursive.separators
properties.description: 分隔符列表（如果为 null，该类内部有默认的分隔符列表）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.semantic.max-chunk-size
properties.description: 最大分块大小 默认值：1000

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.semantic.min-chunk-size
properties.description: 最小分块大小 默认值：200

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.semantic.similarity-threshold
properties.description: 语义相似度阈值 默认值：0.5（0-1之间，越低越容易分块）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.sentence.sentence-overlap
properties.description: 句子重叠数量 默认值：1（保留前一个分块的最后1个句子）

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.token.keep-separator
properties.description: 是否保留分隔符 默认值：true

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.token.max-num-chunks
properties.description: 最大分块数量 默认值：5000

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.token.min-chunk-length-to-embed
properties.description: 嵌入最小分块长度 默认值：10

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.text-splitter.token.min-chunk-size-chars
properties.description: 最小分块字符数 默认值：400

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.batch-del-topk-limit
properties.description: 一次删除操作中，最多删除的文档数量

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.default-similarity-threshold
properties.description: 相似度阈值配置，用于过滤相似度分数大于等于此阈值的文档

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.default-topk-limit
properties.description: 查询时返回的最大文档数量

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.elasticsearch-min-score
properties.description: Elasticsearch最小分数阈值，用于es执行关键词搜索时过滤相关性较低的文档

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.enable-hybrid-search
properties.description: 是否启用混合搜索

properties.name: spring.ai.alibaba.data-agent.vector-store.file-path
properties.description: SimpleVectorStore本地序列化文件地址
